Prologue: ^A man just stepped out from his office for lunch break.
^Oh my god, so hot… My skin will be melting in no time…
^Oh, isn’t this the top student, Ryan?
^Want to grab some ice cream there?
^Then Ryan and Vallerie go into the convenient store nearby.
^You know, I really miss this kind of moment.
^Do you remember you would always eat three strawberry ice creams in high school?
^I just noticed, you are only eating one instead of three and it’s a vanilla not strawberry. What happened?
^Ryan sighs and tells everything to Vallerie about his condition.
^…I am really in a hard time now.
^I can’t even afford a coin laundry.
^Do you have a side job recommendation? I will do everything.
^Vallerie smirks and changes his expression quickly.
^Well, it’s such a shame you have through all of that… Alone.
^I do have a recommendation for you.
^It’s a little weird for someone like you but would you mind hearing about it?
^See this ice cream stick right here?
^You just need to beat every competitor there.
^Sure. We should find a room for that.
